name: Alpha-GPC
summary: Decision-ready summary: Alpha-GPC is best framed for cognitive performance; memory support; power output support; safety screen: low blood pressure; cholinergic sensitivity; anticholinergic medication conflicts.
description: Alpha-GPC supports memory; focus; performance with moderate-high confidence in this merged decision layer.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.

claimMap.claim: v9.8: Alpha-GPC has more clinical-impairment evidence than healthy nootropic evidence; keep low priority.
claimMap.notes: v9.8: Alpha-GPC has more clinical-impairment evidence than healthy nootropic evidence; keep low priority.

qualifiers.dose_or_duration: 600 mg acute for performance contexts; 1200 mg/day used in cognitive impairment contexts

claimMap.claim: v8.2: Alpha-GPC has clinical trial evidence in cognitive impairment contexts; consumer nootropic evidence is more limited.
claimMap.notes: v8.2: Alpha-GPC has clinical trial evidence in cognitive impairment contexts; consumer nootropic evidence is more limited.

qualifiers.dose_or_duration: 600 mg acute for performance contexts; 1200 mg/day used in cognitive impairment contexts
